title: Emerite
description: A mod that adds two new resources: Emerite and Ender Steel.
body:
This mod adds two new resources: Emerite and Ender Steel. Ender steel is found as ender steel scraps in an ore in the end, you need to craft multiple new upgrade template to get both resources. Emerite is made from netherite and emerald (you need a special smithing template). Emerite makes tools and Ender Steel makes armour, there is also Purpur ore that you can combine with chorus fruit to make a Purpur Snack and you can turn Purpur Chunks into purpur blocks.

Jei is recommended but not required

(Show case video uses other mods like Jade, Jei and Journey Map)
